tools.name: Email
tools.description: Let Genie send and read your email

questions.label: How do you get your email?
questions.description: Pick the one that matches how you check email

options.label: My own mail (e.g. work or Gmail)

questions.label: Your email address
questions.description: The address you use to sign in

questions.label: Password or app password
questions.description: Gmail: get an app password at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords (turn on 2-step verification first). Other mail: use your normal password.

tools.name: Web search
tools.description: Let Genie search the web for you

questions.label: Which search do you want?
questions.description: DuckDuckGo is free and needs no signup

questions.label: Google key (only if you chose Google)
questions.description: Get one at aistudio.google.com/apikey or console.cloud.google.com (APIs & Services → Credentials).

questions.label: Google search engine ID (optional)
questions.description: Create a custom search at programmers.google.com and paste the search engine ID here.

questions.label: Bing key (only if you chose Bing)
questions.description: Get one at bing.com/webmasters (Tools → API Access) or portal.azure.com (Cognitive Services).

tools.name: Google Drive
tools.description: Let Genie read and search your Google Drive files

questions.label: Path to your Google key file (optional)
questions.description: Create a service account at console.cloud.google.com → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → Create → Keys → Add key (JSON). Download the file and enter its path here.

tools.name: Jira, Linear, or Asana
tools.description: Let Genie create and update tasks in your project app

questions.label: Your access token
questions.description: Jira: id.atlassian.com → Security → Create and manage API tokens. Linear: linear.app → Settings → API → Personal API keys. Asana: asana.com → My Settings → Apps → Personal access tokens.

questions.label: Your email (only for Jira)
questions.description: The email you use to sign in to Jira

tools.name: GitHub or GitLab
tools.description: Let Genie create branches and pull requests for you

questions.label: Your access token
questions.description: GitHub: github.com/settings/tokens → Generate new token (classic), tick repo. GitLab: gitlab.com/-/user_settings/personal_access_tokens → Add new token, tick api.

questions.label: Your GitLab address (only for your own GitLab)
questions.description: Leave blank if you use gitlab.com
